admin.theme_overrideDesc: Override theme colors. Changes apply instantly and persist in settings.
admin.theme_appearanceSubtitle: Customize the active theme. Manage other themes in the theme library.

admin.theme_resetConfirm: Discard all color overrides for {name} ({mode} mode)?
admin.theme_libraryNoticeBody: Per-theme colors + mode overrides moved to the active theme's appearance page — in the sidebar under the theme's own group, or directly at {path}. This page is the theme library (install / switch / delete).
admin.trophies_ruleEventHint: Leave empty for manual awards only. Any hook event works.
admin.trophies_thresholdHint: How many matching events before the trophy is awarded.
admin.generalSettings_subtitle: Authentication, security, cache, and performance settings
admin.apiDocs_subtitle: Interactive OpenAPI 3.0 reference for core and module endpoints.
admin.moderation_rejectMessage: Selected items will be marked as rejected and hidden from the public site.
admin.trophies_deleteMessage: Delete "{name}"? This also removes it from every user who earned it.
admin.moderation_rejectSingleMessage: This item will be marked as rejected and hidden from the public site.
admin.seo_globalMetaDesc: Default title and description used across your site
admin.seo_defaultTitleHint: The fallback title used when a page has no custom title
admin.seo_titleTemplateHint: Use %s as a placeholder for the page title (e.g. %s | My Site)
admin.seo_defaultDescriptionHint: Fallback description for pages without a custom one
admin.seo_openGraphDesc: Default social sharing image and settings for Facebook, Twitter, etc.
admin.seo_verificationDesc: Verification codes for Google Search Console, Bing Webmaster Tools, etc.
admin.seo_googleVerificationHint: Content value from Google Search Console verification meta tag
admin.seo_bingVerificationHint: Content value from Bing Webmaster Tools verification meta tag

admin.seo_robotsDirectiveHint: e.g. index, follow or noindex, nofollow
admin.seo_canonicalUrlHint: Base URL used for canonical tags (e.g. https://example.com)
admin.seo_pageOverridesDesc: Set custom meta titles and descriptions per page
admin.modules_installToReview: Install this module to leave a review.
admin.users_impersonateDesc: Debug or support this user by logging in as them. Every impersonation is written to the activity log.
admin.users_deleteDesc: This anonymises the user row and purges private data (sessions, messages, cart). Public contributions are preserved.
admin.users_impersonateMessage: You are about to impersonate {username}. Every action will be audited. You can return to your admin account at any time from the banner at the top of the page.
admin.setup_allInstalled: All recommended modules are already installed!
admin.setup_noThemes: No themes available. The default theme will be used.
admin.setup_welcomeDesc: Let's set up your game server platform in a few quick steps.
admin.setup_recommendedDesc: Install essential modules to get started. You can install more later from the marketplace.
admin.setup_chooseThemeDesc: Select a theme for your site. You can change this anytime in Settings.
admin.setup_allSetDesc: Your platform is ready. You can configure payments, Discord, and more in Settings.
admin.cron_runJobMessage: Trigger "{key}" immediately? It will execute synchronously and update its run history.
admin.css_subtitle: Inject custom styles into your site
admin.css_saved: Custom CSS saved. Refresh the site to see changes.
admin.hero_logoUrlDesc: Where to navigate when the logo is clicked. Leave empty to disable click.
admin.hero_showPlayerCountDesc: 'true' to show live player count from server query
admin.moderationSettings_subtitle: Choose which user-submitted content types require admin approval before being visible to visitors.
admin.moderationSettings_blogCommentsDesc: Require approval before comments on blog articles appear publicly.
admin.moderationSettings_forumTopicsDesc: Require approval before new forum topics are listed.
admin.moderationSettings_forumRepliesDesc: Require approval before forum replies appear in a topic.
admin.moderationSettings_suggestionsDesc: Require approval before user suggestions are listed publicly.
admin.alerting_subtitle: Send a Discord or Slack notification when /api/health goes degraded or down.
admin.alerting_alertOnHint: Recovery ('ok' after a bad state) is always sent.

profile.title: Profile
profile.oauthAutoLink: Discord and Google accounts are automatically linked when you log in with them.
profile.downloadYourDataDesc: Get a ZIP archive of every piece of data we hold about your account.
profile.deleteYourAccountDesc: Permanently anonymise your profile. Public posts you have made will be preserved but no longer attributed to your username.
profile.deleteAccountWarning: This cannot be undone. Your sessions, linked accounts, notification preferences, cart, and direct messages will be permanently erased. Public contributions (forum posts, blog articles, orders) will be kept for record but shown as belonging to a deleted user.
profile.noNotificationTypes: No notification types are configured by any installed module yet.
profile.sessionTrackingStarts: Session tracking starts on your next login.
profile.revokeSessionMessage: End this session? It will be signed out immediately.
profile.signOutEverywhereMessage: Sign out of every device. You'll need to log in again on each.
profile.trophiesPageDesc: Achievements you can earn across the community.

auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a password reset link.
auth.resetSuccessBody: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.invalidResetLinkBody: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.verifySuccessBody: Your email has been verified. You can now use all features of your account.
auth.verifyFailedBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from your profile.
auth.errorConfiguration: Server misconfiguration. Please contact the site administrator.
auth.errorAccessDenied: Access denied. You don't have permission to sign in.
auth.errorVerification: The verification link has expired or has already been used.
auth.accountLocked: Too many failed attempts. Your account is temporarily locked. Check your email or try again in a few minutes.
auth.demoBannerBody: Some destructive actions are disabled in this public demo.
auth.registerSuccess: Account created! You can now sign in.

search.title: Search
search.initialHint: Type at least 2 characters to search across all installed modules.
search.noResults: No results for "{query}". Try different keywords.
